name: Bull vs Bear Debate Strategy (TowerIC-inspired)
description: Multi-agent system where bull and bear analysts argue for/against each trade. Only execute when bull case significantly outweighs bear case. Combines fundamental analysis, sentiment, news momentum, and adversarial debate scoring.

setup.description: Fundamental analyst scores value, sentiment analyst scores momentum/news, bull agent argues for entry, bear agent argues against. Trade only when bull score > bear score by a threshold. Risk manager validates position sizing.

agents.name: bull_agent
agents.role: Argue FOR the trade - scores bullish factors

agents.name: bear_agent
agents.role: Argue AGAINST the trade - scores bearish risks

agents.name: trader
agents.role: Makes final call based on bull vs bear score

agents.name: risk_manager
agents.role: Validates position size and portfolio risk

entry.long: Bull score > Bear score by debate_threshold AND fundamentals positive AND sentiment positive
entry.short: Bear score > Bull score by debate_threshold AND fundamentals negative AND sentiment negative
